title: A Photographer at a French Beach Said Gendarmes Checked His ID While Leaving 30 Nearby Migrants Unchecked — He Filmed the Whole Exchange

fullArticle:
French gendarmes checked a photographer’s ID.

A video posted to X by the account @thenowherephoto showed the user being stopped by French gendarmes at Wissant Beach and asked for identification.

"French gendarmes stopped me on Wissant Beach today and demanded my identification," he wrote, adding that roughly 30 migrants were sitting on the beach nearby at the time.

He said he and two others with him were the ones asked to identify themselves. "Three of us were asked for ID. None of the migrants appeared to be asked for theirs," he wrote.
